known_gaps.description: Plan 11 + Plan 12 markdown files are git-untracked (`??` in git status) at packaging time; lesson #24 recommends commit at draft-complete + review-complete checkpoints.

drafter-custos-11 self-report marker (drafter-11.json) not found anywhere in repo; only drafter-12.json exists. Plan 11 content itself is verified via 15 grep-verified file:line anchors + intra-r5 per-plan review coverage.

conflicts_resolved.disposition: Plan 12 Task 1 must grep current version before bumping; skip if already 0.2.0, note in close-out.

conflicts_resolved.conflict: Plan 12 T7 gateway-contract v1 JSON Schema not cross-grepped against arx-side Plan 79 NatsEnvelope Rust struct field names
conflicts_resolved.disposition:
Plan 12 Task 7 Step 3 requires an added sub-step: grep arx events.rs:75-83 (EventEnvelope

) + Plan 79 NatsEnvelope 7-field definition per schema; golden baseline must be sourced from arx-side authority, not Plan 12's own draft. Blocks Task 7 close-out only, not packet readiness or other tasks' dispatch.

conflicts_resolved.conflict: Plan 12 DP5 script entry name placeholder 'custos' pending Plan 11 lock
conflicts_resolved.disposition: Accepted design; Plan 12 Task 9 already has fanout-check gate for this (lesson #35).
